title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say why the people might have chosen these forms of exercise and what they might enjoy about them.

images.label: A
images.description: A person running through a park in a city on a sunny morning.

images.label: B
images.description: A group of people in a bright gym studio taking part in an energetic fitness class.

followUp.question: Which activity do you think has the most benefits for a person's overall health? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say how these activities help people to relax and why someone might choose each one.

images.label: D
images.description: A person sitting in a cosy armchair reading a book beside a fireplace.

images.label: E
images.description: A group of friends having a picnic in a sunny countryside meadow.

followUp.question: Which of these activities do you think is the most effective way to reduce stress? (Why?)
